Service 01

Kitchen Remodel

The heart of your home, reimagined.

We design and build fully custom kitchens from the ground up — optimizing your layout, maximizing storage, and selecting materials that will look beautiful for decades. No flat-pack. No shortcuts. Every cabinet is built for your exact space.

What's Included
✓
Custom cabinet design & fabrication
✓
Countertop installation (Quartz, Marble, Granite)
✓
Full layout reconfiguration
✓
Island design & build
✓
Backsplash & tile work
✓
Appliance integration
✓
Lighting design & installation
✓
Plumbing & sink installation
Material Finish
Sink Detail
Pantry Storage
Dining Integration
Starting From
$25,000
Timeline
6–10 wks
Warranty
5 yrs
Start My Kitchen Project →
Service 02

Bathroom Renovation

Your personal sanctuary, built from scratch.

We gut and rebuild bathrooms with the same precision we bring to every project — custom tile work, built-in niches, walk-in showers, heated floors, and vanities designed specifically for your space. Master bath or powder room, we handle it all.

What's Included
✓
Full demo & waterproofing
✓
Walk-in shower design & build
✓
Custom vanity fabrication
✓
Tile selection & installation
✓
Radiant heated floor (optional)
✓
Plumbing fixtures & rough-in
✓
Built-in storage & niches
✓
Mirrors & lighting design
Starting From
$18,000
Timeline
3–6 wks
Warranty
5 yrs
Start My Bathroom Project →
Service 03

Custom Cabinetry

Storage that's beautiful, not just functional.

Built-in cabinetry transforms any space — from a cluttered living room into a refined showroom, from a cramped closet into a walk-in wardrobe worth showing off. Every piece is designed to fit your exact dimensions and lifestyle.

What's Included
✓
Custom closet & wardrobe systems
✓
Living room built-ins & media walls
✓
Home office cabinetry & desks
✓
Laundry room organization
✓
Garage storage systems
✓

✓
Pull-out drawers & soft-close hardware
✓
Choice of finish, material & hardware

Your personal sanctuary, reimagined.

Service 04

Flooring & Millwork

The foundation of every beautiful room.

The right floor ties an entire home together. We supply and install hardwood, engineered wood, large-format tile, and luxury vinyl — and we finish every edge, threshold, and transition with the same precision we apply to everything else.

What's Included
✓
Solid & engineered hardwood
✓
Large-format porcelain tile
✓
Luxury vinyl plank (LVP)
✓
Herringbone & pattern installation
✓
Subfloor prep & leveling
✓
Refinishing existing hardwood
✓
Crown molding & baseboards
✓
Wainscoting & wall paneling
Starting From
$6,000
Timeline
1–3 wks
Warranty
3 yrs
Start My Flooring Project →

Every room. Every system. One team.

Our most comprehensive service — we handle the complete transformation of your home from top to bottom. One team, one schedule, one point of contact. We coordinate every trade and manage every detail so you don't have to.

Service 06

Outdoor & Entryway

First impressions that last forever.

The spaces between your home and the world — mudrooms, entryways, covered porches, and patios — deserve the same attention to detail as any interior room. We design and build these transitional spaces to be as beautiful as they are functional.

What's Included
✓
Custom mudroom design & build
✓
Built-in bench & cubbies
✓
Entryway flooring & tile
✓
Covered porch renovation
✓
Patio design & pavers
✓
Exterior door & window trim
✓
Exterior lighting design
✓
Drainage & waterproofing

$12,000
Timeline
2–5 wks
Warranty
3 yrs

Investment Guide

Transparent Pricing,
No Surprises

We believe in honest pricing from day one. Here's a general guide to help you plan — every project gets a detailed written quote before any work begins.

Single Room
Kitchen or Bathroom
Essential Renovation
$18K+
Typical range: $18,000 – $60,000
  • ✓
    One room fully renovated
  • ✓
    Custom cabinetry & countertops
  • ✓
    New plumbing fixtures
  • ✓
    Tile & flooring work
  • ✓
    5-year workmanship warranty
  • —
    Multiple rooms
Most Popular
2–3 Room Package
Full Renovation
$60K+

    Kitchen + 1–2 bathrooms
  • ✓

    All flooring & millwork

    Dedicated project manager

    How It Works

    From First Call
    to Final Walkthrough

    Every project follows the same clear, proven process — refined over 200+ renovations. You'll always know what's happening, what's coming next, and exactly what it costs. No surprises. No stress.


    From your very first call, you'll work with the same dedicated designer and project manager all the way through to completion.

    01
    📞
    Free Consultation
    We visit your home, listen to your vision, goals, and budget. No pressure, no obligation.
    02
    🎨
    Custom Design
    3D renders, material samples, layout options — until every detail feels right.
    03
    📋
    Clear Proposal
    Detailed written quote with line-item pricing. No hidden fees. No surprises.
    04
    🔨
    Renovation
    Our skilled crew handles everything. Weekly check-ins keep you in the loop.
    05
    ✅
    Final Walkthrough
    You approve every detail. We're not done until you love the result.
    FAQ

    Common
    Questions

    Everything you need to know before starting your renovation project. Don't see your question here?

    Ask Us Directly →
    Yes, completely. We come to your home, assess the space, listen to your goals, and give you our honest recommendations — with zero obligation. We believe the relationship starts with trust, and that means no pressure on a first meeting.
    It depends on the scope. A single bathroom typically takes 3–5 weeks. A kitchen runs 6–10 weeks. A whole-home renovation is usually 12–24 weeks. We'll give you a precise timeline before work begins — and we stick to it.
    Yes. We handle all permit applications, scheduling of inspections, and final approvals. You don't need to navigate any of that. We know the local building departments in Nassau and Suffolk Counties extremely well.
    In most cases, yes — especially for single-room projects. For whole-home renovations, it depends on the scope. We'll be honest with you upfront about what's realistic and help you plan accordingly. We always seal off work zones to minimize dust and disruption.
    We primarily serve Long Island (Nassau and Suffolk Counties) and the NYC metro area including Queens, Brooklyn, and Manhattan. Not sure if you're in our service area? Just ask — we'll let you know right away.
    All of our workmanship is backed by a 5-year warranty. Materials are covered by their manufacturers' warranties, which we help you manage. If something isn't right, we come back and fix it — that's our commitment.
    Simply fill out the form on our contact page or give us a call. We'll schedule a free in-home consultation within a few days. From there, we'll design your project, provide a detailed quote, and get to work. It's that simple.
    Ready to Start?

    Let's Build Something
    You'll Love Forever

    Every great renovation starts with a single conversation. Tell us about your home, your goals, and your budget — we'll handle everything else.
